DescribeLLMTrace.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal to, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal to
DescribeLLMTrace.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMTrace.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeLLMTrace.returnHeight: Whether to return the span height in the waterfall chart. Default: false
